name: codex-conversational-insights
description: Capture prompt-level Codex conversational analytics and skill usage into Notion.

interface.shortDescription: Prompt analytics and skill usage capture for Codex
interface.longDescription: Installs a Codex UserPromptSubmit hook that classifies prompts, enriches rows with detected skill usage, and writes the results to a configured Notion database.
interface.defaultPrompt: Install prompt-level Codex analytics into Notion
